headline: Is Linde (LIN) Pricing Reflect Its DCF And P/E Signals After Mixed Recent Returns
summary: If you are wondering whether Linde's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this review will help you make sense of what you are paying for and what you are actually getting. Linde recently closed at US$495.49, with returns of 1.2% over the past week, a 1.7% decline over the past month, 15.5% year to date and 8.1% over the last year, which gives you a mixed snapshot of how the market has been treating the stock. Recent coverage has focused on Linde's role within the broader...
